title: epiblema #1915
definition:
1) that which is thrown or put upon a thing, or that which is
    added to it
    1a) an addition
    1b) that which is sewed on to cover a rent, a patch
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) that which is thrown or put upon a thing, or that which is
    added to it
    1a) an addition
    1b) that which is sewed on to cover a rent, a patch

    NASB:  that which is put on, i.e. a patch:
